name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the user-facing pain point. "I want to do X but currently
     can't / it's awkward because Y." -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- What would the feature look like from the user's perspective?
     UI mockup, API sketch, or just a paragraph is fine. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Anything you've already tried, or other ways to solve the same
     problem. -->

## Scope check

Some things are deliberately out of scope to keep self-hosting simple.
Please read [`CONTRIBUTING.md → What's out of scope`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
first. If your request falls into that list, please make the case for
why it's worth the complexity.

- [ ] I've read CONTRIBUTING.md and this is in scope.
- [ ] This is in the "ask first" list and here's why it's worth it: <!-- … -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links, references, related projects, etc. -->
